keyPoints: Gradient Descent (GD) is a fundamental optimization method used in Machine Learning and Deep Learning to minimize the cost function or loss function of a model.
Batch Gradient Descent (BGD) is an extension of GD, where the gradients are computed by taking the average of the gradients across a batch of training examples.
Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) is another variation of GD, where the gradients are computed individually using a single training example from the dataset.
